_doc: Canonical decode perf budget for gnosis-openai-mesh / mistral-7b. Single source of truth for MESH_DECODE_PERF_BUDGET.md + MESH_BANDWIDTH_CONSTRAINTS.md + admit-decode-profile.py. Zero runtime cost: consumed post-hoc on bench-decode-next output to ADMIT/REJECT a candidate revision (earn-prod-via-benchmark). Numbers measured 2026-06-21 on the live L4.

hard_gates._note: divergent_tokens != 0 is an automatic grade F (wrong output) regardless of speed. Correctness gates everything.

grades._doc: Quality report-card scale: grade = highest band whose min_tps <= sustained tok/s. Correctness (divergent_tokens==0) is prerequisite; any divergence => F.

15.status: stretch — Q8-opt kernel (needs >=135 GB/s on 7.55GB) or Q4_K

20.status: Q8-opt (>=194 GB/s) or Q4_K; f16 impossible

components_bytes_gb._note: weight bytes READ per token (summed over 32 layers; logit=lm_head once).

required_bw_gbs._note: effective HBM GB/s to read the dtype's weights inside that target's matvec budget.
